name: MeowFacts
tagline: Retrieve cat facts in multiple languages
description: Return one or more cat facts, optionally selecting a fact identifier or a supported localization.

tools.name: get_cat_facts
tools.description: Return cat facts with optional count, identifier, and language selection.

params.name: id
params.description: Specific fact identifier or ordering position.

params.name: lang
params.description: Supported locale code such as eng-us or por-br.
